title: phyteuma orbiculare subsp. ibericum
intro: Phyteuma orbiculare subsp. ibericum, also known as the Iberian bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iberian bellflower include reducing inflammation, calming coughs, and soothing skin irritations. Iberian bellflower can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
